storyInfo: Rankin, we made it. The village near the Ursus-Kazimierz border, where Reunion is. This warm... egalitarian, idealistic place.

attributes.content: <p=1>Barren Farmlands, Ursus-Kazimierz Border</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Oh... Another sunny day. I don't seem to remember any winters ever being so warm.
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: How wonderful... As long as the wheat we're planting survives the winter and we don't hit a Catastrophe, we'll be self-sufficient next year!
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: It's a little too early to celebrate, after all I've been through...
attributes.name: Worried Old Woman

attributes.content: Come on, have a little optimism, Babushka! There was a time we thought we'd have nowhere to go, that we'd just die in the barrens! But now, we have our own farm, a house, and hot porridge—
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: Huh? Who's over there...?
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: It's Miss Talulah! And Nine!
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: Miss Talulah, are you helping us pull the weeds?
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: Talulah, she's talking to you.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Oh—
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Yes, that's right. Am I doing it wrong?
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: I saw everyone doing it this way, and the weeds here have grown pretty tall. So tall you can't see the wheat.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: No, no, you're doing it right. Pulling the weeds out will help make sure the wheat gets enough nutrients to survive the winter—
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: You're such a quick learner!
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: Pff.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: You've already pulled so many, and you haven't hurt a single wheat bud! Looks like you don't need my help anymore.
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: You taught us well. How's Iakov, by the way?
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: The new medicine he's been taking is very effective, thanks to you! He used to writhe in pain until he fell out of bed at night, but no more.
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: Be sure to take care of yourself, too.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: I know. Honestly, this is already much better than what I was expecting, getting to keep him by my side.
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: Thank you, both of you, and bless the Reunion Movement!
attributes.name: Happy Peasant Woman

attributes.content: ...No need to thank me.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: It's been two years, and you still feel uneasy when people show you their gratitude.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: I thought you'd have gotten used to it long ago.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Well, I'm not the one they should be thanking.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Sure enough. They are united under Reunion's banner, but they should actually be thanking themselves.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Not everyone has the courage and ability to rebuild their lives from the rubble.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: I hope they'll realize that.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: And you might want to realize how obvious it is when your mind is drifting away.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: I was just wondering... when is Hui-chieh going to come back again?
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Don't tell me you're worried about her.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Every time she's here, she brings back news.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Catastrophe Messengers avoid this disputed area, and normal ones won't so much as pass through. The information network we've spent two years building up is still far from comprehensive.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: I'm waiting... waiting for Hui-chieh to bring something more real.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: What kind of news do you want to hear?
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Anything... I want to know what's actually happening in Ursus right now.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: You don't believe what we saw in the west.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: What, you do?
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: The upper class gave a little handout out of kindness, and that was enough to quell the anger for the most part, and enough to make those beset by injustice forget to think and resist.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: At the very least, we certainly did not receive any requests for help from the mining districts, whether from the west or even farther away.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Perhaps they just don't know of our existence, or they can't reach us.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Besides, we still have yet to build a truly stable stronghold here.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: But the people here haven't lost hope in us because of it.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: But they should, Nine.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Talulah looks back in the direction where the sun is hanging high in the sky.
She stares into its light, until her eyes start to hurt.
Even if our village is almost self-sufficient right now, an unforeseen Catastrophe could easily wipe everything out in one fell swoop.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: The first couple months saw that happen again and again, and it took much trial-and-error for us to make it here.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: But these peaceful days won't last long. I once believed that after our long journey, we'd have more companions leave us than remain. I never would've thought our group would grow larger.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: And it's not because we ran into more oppressed people. It's because those who chose us haven't lost faith in us, even if they ought to have.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: All we've done is show them a bit of kindness, and most of them chose to give unconditional trust in return.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Even after they've felt the pain of survival time and again, their barren lands can still yield these emotions more precious than gold?
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: I can't... After all that, I can't even imagine.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Which is why I started to think... What if it's just how everything is supposed to unfold? This is the truth that these humblest people believe.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: They fall down, then get back up. They fail, and they start over.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: What's your point?
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: We will fail again, Nine, but I think we don't have to fear this anymore.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Well, you're wrong. I've never been afraid of it.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: But those who walked with us have felt that fear. After all, not everyone has such a grand outlook as you. Many of them just hope to see the next sunrise.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Nine, the new suppressant pipeline's finished. Should we put it to use right away?
attributes.name: Infected Fighter

attributes.content: Valiya.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Yeah?
attributes.name: Infected Fighter

attributes.content: If I were to tell you we're abandoning this place and heading to Deity Grypherburg, what would you do?
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Hah! Of course I'm coming with you. Why?
attributes.name: Infected Fighter

attributes.content: What about the others?
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: Them too. We knew all along that Reunion wasn't going to stop here.
attributes.name: Infected Fighter

attributes.content: But I don't think all of us should go. Everyone's been doing different things here for a while. Those of us who can fight should go with you, but the rest can still stay here.
attributes.name: Infected Fighter

attributes.content: You're right.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Hmph...
attributes.name: Infected Fighter

attributes.content: Nine, it's just as he said... I think perhaps we're ready now—
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: We're ready to face the hideous truth hiding behind all that's bright and colorful. After they've long taken root and proliferated, they can't all be pulled at once...
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: In such a case, we can only keep pulling away. A second time, and a third time... for as long as we live, until someone finally succeeds.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Now that we know who we must bring together, the time may have come to break these shackles, and we should do it without hesitation.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Uniting all those who can unite, and breaking all chains that should never have chained us...
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: We need only a single opportunity.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Talulah. Nine.
attributes.name: Red

attributes.content: It's urgent.
attributes.name: Red

attributes.content: What is it, Red? It's not like you to look so nervous.
attributes.name: Nine

attributes.content: I ran into a group of refugees near the village. They said they're miners who escaped the Far North, and they're here cause they've heard tell of Reunion.
attributes.name: Red

attributes.content: I checked them over. They're unarmed, and they're all Infected. I had them wait at the sentry post. We need you to decide what to do.
attributes.name: Red

attributes.content: From the Far North? We haven't heard much from there. What do you mean, they 'escaped?'
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Yeah, not much intel ever leaks out of there.
attributes.name: Red

attributes.content: As for what happened... maybe it's better you hear it from them.
attributes.name: Red

attributes.content: Thanks... Thanks for taking us in, kind lady, mister... Are you the Reunion Movement we heard about?
attributes.name: Worried Miner

attributes.content: I never would've thought... what Rankin told us was true... My goodness...
attributes.name: Worried Miner

attributes.content: Slow down. We are Reunion, and we will do what we can to help all our suffering comrades.
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: Could you please tell us what you've been through?
attributes.name: Talulah

attributes.content: We...
attributes.name: Worried Miner

attributes.content: There was a massacre in the Far North...
attributes.name: Worried Miner
